title: delphinium peregrinum var. elongatum
intro: Delphinium peregrinum var. elongatum, commonly known as the Alpine Delphinium or Elongated Delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Delphinium peregrinum var. elongatum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
